synthesis.driver: Oversupply is capping war premium gains from escalating US-Iran strikes, keeping Brent down 0.36.
synthesis.based_on: New Delhi tells shipowners not to deploy Indian seafarers on Hormuz routes

takes.new delhi tells shipowners not to deploy: Indian crew restrictions signal heightened risk, mildly bullish for Hormuz oil flows.

takes.oil prices decline on global markets: Global oversupply outweighs geopolitical risks, pushing oil prices lower.
takes.us resumes attacks on iran trading ships: US targeting VLCCs intensifies Hormuz risks, supporting upward pressure on crude prices.
